# UvRect constructor

Normalized atlas sub-rect (0..1, origin bottom-left, Unity texture-space convention) for [`SpriteElement`](../../Stellar.Abstractions.Services/SpriteElement.md). A plain BCL struct so the Abstractions layer carries no Unity dependency — the renderer maps it to `UnityEngine.Rect`.

```csharp
public UvRect(float X, float Y, float W, float H)
```
